description: A bilingual (EN + JA) Q&A corpus encoding the documented judgment of four research lines — Agent Knowledge Cycle, Contemplative Agent, Agent Attribution Practice, and Authorship Strategy — as judgment-eliciting pairs designed for LLM-mediated diffusion. The corpus is the operational form of Authorship Strategy Layer 4 tactic 7 (LLM-first ingest). It is base-model-independent and is intended as an ingredient — for larger instruction-tuning mixes, RAG retrieval, and human reading — rather than as a standalone fine-tuning package. A Stage D verification LoRA (Qwen3-8B-4bit, 851 examples, 300 iterations) was trained as a disposable probe and returned a preliminary FAIL verdict on the judgment-transfer rubric; the corpus retains its deliverable status and the LoRA was never a deposit target.
name: doctrine-corpus: A judgment-eliciting Q&A corpus across the shimo4228 research program
